content: The Watchlist tab has two sub-tabs: Stocks and AI Watchlist. The Stocks sub-tab shows a grid of TradingView stock mini-overviews and a stock screener widget. The AI Watchlist sub-tab has two views: (1) '3D Supply Chain' — an interactive 3D visualization showing 5 layers of the AI stack as a funnel. It maps supply-chain relationships between ~100 companies. Users can drag to rotate, scroll to zoom, and hover nodes to see connections with animated lightbeams. Edges have confidence levels: Confirmed, Reported, Inferred with filter toggles. (2) 'Ticker List' — flat list of TradingView widgets grouped by layer. The 5 AI Stack layers (bottom to top): Energy Layer (NEE, CEG, VST, ED, TLN — utilities powering data centers), Chips Layer (NVDA, TSM, AMD, INTC, AVGO, ARM + Cerebras, Groq, SambaNova), Infrastructure (MSFT, AMZN, GOOGL, DELL, SMCI + CoreWeave, Lambda Labs), Models (MSFT/OpenAI, GOOGL/Gemini, META/Llama, AMZN/Bedrock + OpenAI, Anthropic, xAI, Mistral, Cohere), Application (CRM, ADBE, PLTR, CRWD, NOW, FICO + Databricks, Scale AI, Figma, Canva). Example supply chains: ED -> NVDA -> AMZN -> Anthropic -> Palantir.
